notableEvents.label: Corey Seager GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Corey Seager grounds into a double play, second baseman Jeff McNeil to shortstop Jacob Wilson to first baseman Nick Kurtz. Joc Pederson out at 2nd. Corey Seager out at 1st.
